name: Avon High School
description: Avon High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Avon, OH. There are 11 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to water.

name: Avon Lake Anchor Recreation Facility
description: Avon Lake Anchor Recreation Facility is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Avon Lake, OH. There are 4 indoor wood courts. fees: Fee required — $6 drop in | 12 visits for $60

name: Ewing Field House - LCCC
description:
LCCC has PB throughout the week Monday-Saturday.  Need to call LCCC at (440) 366-7423 for schedule as changes from month to month and week to week.  There are sessions for beginners, intermediate and advanced.  There are also clinics.
Posted by Rick Warsinskey, NE Ohio PB Ambassador. Contact Rick to get  his comprehensive guides where to play PB in NE Ohio at rickwarsinskey@gmail.com or 216-409-2882
fees: Fee required — Cost: Free if student; free if silvers sneakers and renew active All others: $5
